content.text:
You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to describe a target word for another player to guess.

Rules:
(a) You have to reply in the form: CLUE: <some text>. Guesses from the other player will start with GUESS.
(b) You cannot use the target word itself, parts or morphological variants of it in your description.
(c) In addition, the same rules apply for related words which are provided below.

End conditions:
(i) If you use the target word or a related word in your description, then you lose.
(ii) If the other player can guess the target word in 3 tries, you both win.

Let us start.

This is the target word that you need to describe and that the other player needs to guess:

phantom

Related words are:

- unreal
- ghost
- apparition

Important: You are under time pressure, give short descriptions that are to the point!

content.thinking:
I need to describe "phantom" without using:
- phantom (the target word)
- unreal
- ghost
- apparition

I should think of what a phantom is and describe it in other terms. A phantom is a supernatural being, something that appears but isn't really there, often associated with haunting or spooky situations.

I could say:
- "A spooky spirit or specter"
- "Something that haunts but isn't physically there"
- "An illusion of a deceased person"
- "A spectral presence"
- "Like the Phantom of the Opera"

Let me go with something concise and clear:

content.text: CLUE: A spectral or supernatural being that haunts places, often invisible or translucent

clem_player.response: CLUE: A spectral or supernatural being that haunts places, often invisible or translucent

content.text:
You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to guess a target word that another player describes to you.

You can make one guess at each trial. You win when you guess the target word. You lose when you cannot guess it in 3 tries.

After each trial you will get a new hint from the other player which starts with CLUE.

Make your guesses by just saying the word using the following form: GUESS: <a word>

Let us start.


CLUE: A spectral or supernatural being that haunts places, often invisible or translucent

content.thinking:
The clue describes "a spectral or supernatural being that haunts places, often invisible or translucent." This is clearly describing a ghost.

Key words in the clue:
- Spectral (relating to ghosts/spirits)
- Supernatural being
- Haunts places
- Invisible or translucent

This is a straightforward description of a ghost.

content.text: CLUE: The masked figure from "The ___ of the Opera," or something that seems real but isn't actually there

clem_player.response: CLUE: The masked figure from "The ___ of the Opera," or something that seems real but isn't actually there

content.text:
You are playing a collaborative word guessing game in which you have to guess a target word that another player describes to you.

You can make one guess at each trial. You win when you guess the target word. You lose when you cannot guess it in 3 tries.

After each trial you will get a new hint from the other player which starts with CLUE.

Let us start.


CLUE: A spectral or supernatural being that haunts places, often invisible or translucent
CLUE: The masked figure from "The ___ of the Opera," or something that seems real but isn't actually there

content.thinking:
The clue is referring to "The Phantom of the Opera" and also describes something that seems real but isn't actually there. A phantom is indeed something that appears to exist but doesn't - like a phantom pain or a phantom figure. This fits perfectly with the previous clue about a spectral or supernatural being.

The answer is clearly "phantom".
